temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a young man with dark hair and round glasses, his face illuminated by a soft light from the front. He wears a brown jacket over a grey t-shirt. His expression is one of concern and apprehension as he looks slightly off-camera. The background is a dark, cluttered space, possibly a workshop or a storage room, filled with shelves of indistinct objects. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera is steady, holding the focus on the man's worried face. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score. The deep, resonant tones create a palpable sense of dread and anticipation, as if something unsettling is about to happen. The music is slow and atmospheric, building a tense and mysterious mood without any dialogue or sound effects to distract from its powerful, foreboding presence. The camera cuts to a shot from behind the same man. He is now walking slowly through the dark, cluttered environment. The lighting is dim, casting deep shadows and obscuring most of the details of the surroundings. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera follows him from behind, maintaining a steady, over-the-shoulder perspective as he moves deeper into the dark space.
